---
title: "The Mabinogion from the Llyfr Coch o Hergest, and other ancient Welsh manuscripts, with an English translation and notes by Lady Charlotte Guest"
---

## The Mabinogion from the Llyfr Coch o Hergest, and other ancient Welsh manuscripts, with an English translation and notes by Lady Charlotte Guest
**Date:** 1838
**Imprint:** London: Longman

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
